tracks.meaning: to make something possible or able to function by providing necessary means or conditions
to activate or turn on a feature, function, or setting in software or a device
to give official permission or legal authority for something to happen
to configure or prepare hardware or software to operate or support a capability
to provide someone with the resources, authority, or conditions needed to perform a task or role
to give someone the confidence, power, or opportunity to do something they want
to allow or facilitate the occurrence of dialogue, connection, or information exchange
